liked.title: Pages tear out cleanly
liked.sub: Goes straight from book to fridge

liked.title: Full Bible story range
liked.sub: Noah, Daniel, Jesus, Easter — all year

caveat_body: More activity-focused than devotional — no scripture verse printed on each page. Great for fun Bible-themed coloring, less for verse-by-verse study.
caveat_sub: Best for: ages 3–8 · Sunday school · home activity time
